LJCCSParser.summary: Provides methods to parse a source line for class, method and property definitions.

ClassName.summary: Attempts to parse a class name.
ClassName.returns: The class name if the line contains a class definition; otherwise null.

MethodName.summary: Attempts to parse a method name.
MethodName.returns: The method name if the line contains a method definition; otherwise null.

PropertyName.summary: Attempts to parse a property name.
PropertyName.returns: The property name if the line contains a property definition; otherwise null.

ClassModifier2.summary: Gets or sets the second class access modifier.

DataType.summary: Gets or sets the data types.

Modifier.summary: Gets or sets the access modifiers.

Modifier2.summary: Gets or sets the second access modifier.
